description: The test vectors in this file check implementations of EC point multiplications.
There are some differences to test files for ECDH.
This test focuses on the correct arithmetic implementation.
Base points are always on the curve, but not necessarily in an ECDH subgroup.
Without subgroup restriction it is easier to construct edge cases allowing better tests.
This file contains test vectors for pairing friendly curves.
Points use a compressed format from https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-irtf-cfrg-pairing-friendly-curves-11 .
This is an experimental file and will likely change.

EdgeCaseArithmetic.desc: The test vector uses constructed values to check for arithmetic errors.

Pseudorandom.desc: The test vector has been generated pseudorandomly.

Unmodified.desc: This test vector contains a valid test case and should be valid. It is used as a basis to generate additional modified test vectors.
